calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Application To Substitute Party Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Primary Financial Services, LLC's application to substitute party is granted. Moving party has demonstrated that the requested substitution is appropriate and justified. (See Code Civ. Proc. 368.5.) Order signed.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)
